zh.lifeSummary: 當John Symonds於大約1450年出生在英國史洛普爾邱奇 斯特頓時，他的父親Robert Symonds32歲，母親Catherine Ann Congrave31歲。他和Agnes Gravenor至少有5個兒子和7個女兒。他去世於1505年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Symonds
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Simmons , with excrescent -d.

variants.name: Simmons
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of Simon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Symonds was born about 1450, in Church Stretton, Shropshire, England, his father, Robert Symonds, was 32 and his mother, Catherine Ann Congrave, was 31. He had at least 5 sons and 7 daughters with Agnes Gravenor. He died in 1505, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles avec Agnes Gravenor. Il est décédé en 1505, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hatte mit Agnes Gravenor mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1505 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: John Symondsが約1450年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアチャーチ ストレットオンで生まれた時，父Robert Symondsは32歳，母Catherine Ann Congraveは31歳であった。彼はAgnes Gravenorとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼は1505年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.Cley next the Sea, Norfolk, England: 영국 노르폴크 클리 니스트 테 시
ko.lifeSummary: John Symonds(이)가 대략 1450년 영국 슈럽실르 처르치 스트레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Symonds(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Ann Congrave(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Agnes Gravenor(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Symonds nasceu aproximadamente 1450, em Church Stretton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Symonds, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Ann Congrave, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas com Agnes Gravenor. ru.Cley next the Sea, Norfolk, England: кли некст т сеа, норфолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Symonds родился около 1450 г. в местности чурч стреттон, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Symonds было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Ann Congrave, 31. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей от Agnes Gravenor. Он умер в 1505 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
